SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?exoplanet ?label WHERE {
  ?exoplanet wdt:P31 wd:Q191414 ; wdt:P571 ?date .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?date) , 1 , 4) = "2021")
  OPTIONAL {
    ?exoplanet rdfs:label ?label .
    FILTER(lang(?label) = 'en')
  }
}
```
